title: Section 34
content: (1) Any dispute arising out of a contract between the Academy and any of its employees shall, at the request of the employee concerned or at the instance of the Academy, be referred to a Tribunal of Arbitration consisting of one member appointed by the Director, one member nominated by the employee, and such two arbitrators shall appoint the third arbitrator who shall act as the presiding arbitrator. (2) The arbitration under sub-section (1) shall be governed by the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996 (26 of 1996).
